economic_notes: GBEs include Ulkatcho Mercantile Ltd., 690361 B.C. Ltd., Yun Ka Wun'ten Development Limited Partnership, Yun Ka Wun'ten Holdings Ltd., and Ulkatcho Land Holdings Ltd. Blackwater project revenue of $112,500. Nation under ISC Management Action Plan (MAP) since 2013. West Chilcotin Forest Products Ltd. also referenced. Investments in Gatcho Resort and Traplines. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP interest held.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. ISC funding nearly doubled vs prior year ($8.3M vs $4.1M), likely COVID-19 related. Nation has been under ISC Management Action Plan since 2013; MAP not updated since November 2018 due to COVID delays. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,340,133 + Province of BC $2,151,939 + First Nations Health Authority $1,879,119 + Government of Canada $84,500 + CCATEC $77,248 + FNESC $66,794 - deferred revenue net ($30,000 - $52,713) = approximately $12,387,285. OSR includes rental, Blackwater project, interest, insurance proceeds, TRU, and entity income. Wages and benefits from expenses by object = $1,853,259. Honoraria of $312,908 included separately.
